description: Curated Polymarket mirror seed set for the AI/company/tech launch (SYB-150). Addressed by Polymarket Gamma event id so selection is deterministic and auditable. When `--curated-markets-path`/`CURATED_MARKETS_PATH` points at this file, the mirror fetches exactly these events by id and mirrors their active, non-closed child markets (instead of the volume-ranked category scan). Each resulting Sybil market carries its Polymarket condition id, parent event id, and the Polymarket event URL as mirror provenance. To update: verify an event is still live via `https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?id=<event_id>` (active=true, closed=false, >=1 active child market), then add/remove an entry here and redeploy sybil-polymarket. Verified live 2026-07-05.

events.title: Which company has best AI model end of 2026?
events.note: NegRisk multi-outcome (-> Sybil MarketGroup). 15 active company outcomes + placeholder inactive slots (Company A..K) that the mirror skips. Ends 2026-12-31.

events.title: Will a Chinese company have the best AI model by December 31?
Which company's AI will first hit 1550 on Chatbot Arena in 2026?
events.note: NegRisk multi-outcome (-> Sybil MarketGroup). ~11 active outcomes incl. a 'None in 2026' leg + placeholder inactive slots the mirror skips. Ends 2026-12-31.

events.title: U.S. enacts AI safety bill before 2027?
AI bubble burst by...? (2026 leg)
events.note: Container event 'AI bubble burst by...?' with three dated legs; only 'AI bubble burst in 2026?' (groupItemTitle 'December 31, 2026', condition 0x857398c4502bc725fef7efb3cd503a30d3e18e486ab8173fdf505a76cf83b168) is active. The March-31-2026 and Dec-31-2025 legs are already closed and are filtered out by the mirror's active/!closed gate. This is the ticket's 'AI bubble burst by December 31, 2026?' candidate. Ends 2026-12-31.

events.title: Will AI be charged with a crime before 2027?
What kind of product will OpenAI announce in 2026?
events.note: Multi-outcome (non-NegRisk): 10 independent product-type binaries sharing the event id, grouped as a frontend multi-card (no MarketGroup constraint). Ends 2026-12-31.

events.title: Which CEOs will be out before 2027?
events.note: Multi-outcome (non-NegRisk): 6 CEO binaries sharing the event id. The Tim Cook (Apple) leg is already closed and is skipped by the active/!closed gate. Ends 2026-12-31.

events.title: Will Anthropic's valuation hit __ by December 31?
events.note: VALUATION-THRESHOLD EVENT (ticket 'configured threshold'). Non-NegRisk ladder of 13 threshold binaries (LOW $600B..$800B, HIGH $1.0T..$5.0T) sharing the event id; the mirror mirrors the whole live ladder as a frontend multi-card. Configured/at-the-money threshold documented for the ticket = HIGH $1.75T (condition 0xc68fea7daba83292fdd7bb704f26d38c4f678cbc2ff69c4175d47c55e74b4321), the live market closest to 50/50 (YES ~0.475) as of 2026-07-05. The $1.0T and $1.1T legs are already resolved YES (closed) and are skipped. Event resolves 2027-01-01T12:00:00Z (labelled 'by December 31').

events.title: Will OpenAI's valuation hit __ by December 31?
events.note: VALUATION-THRESHOLD EVENT (ticket 'configured threshold'). Non-NegRisk ladder of 15 threshold binaries (LOW $500B..$800B, HIGH $900B..$5.0T) sharing the event id; the mirror mirrors the whole live ladder as a frontend multi-card. Configured/at-the-money threshold documented for the ticket = HIGH $1.25T (condition 0x0a0fb756d8dc5c3cf0a16eebc7d6d39406155a41e13d00bf615fc0fcd9e9c31a), the live market closest to 50/50 (YES ~0.485) as of 2026-07-05. Event resolves 2027-01-01T12:00:00Z (labelled 'by December 31').
